name: Industry Verticals
description: Industry-specific operational monitoring — energy, manufacturing, healthcare, transportation, oil & gas, retail, aviation, telecom, water utilities, and insurance.
quickTip: Combine standard infrastructure TAs with industry-specific data sources (SCADA historians, HL7 feeds, fleet telematics, POS systems) for vertical-specific observability.

subcategories.name: Energy and Utilities
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk OT Intelligence (Splunkbase 5180), OT Security Add-on (Splunkbase 5151), Splunk Edge Hub, custom HEC inputs from SCADA/EMS/DMS systems.
subcategories.dataSources: SCADA alarm logs, AMI smart meter data, OMS outage records, PI historian via HEC, DNP3/IEC 104 protocol data, power quality monitors, energy trading systems.

subcategories.name: Manufacturing and Process Industry
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk OT Intelligence (Splunkbase 5180), Splunk Edge Hub, custom HEC inputs from MES/ERP/SCADA systems.
subcategories.dataSources: OPC-UA tags via Edge Hub/OTI, MES production logs, ERP event logs, quality management system, CMMS work orders, energy meters.

subcategories.name: Healthcare and Life Sciences
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom HEC inputs from EHR systems (Epic, Cerner), HL7 interface engines, DICOM gateways, environmental monitoring (MQTT/Edge Hub), pharmacy systems, lab information systems.
subcategories.dataSources: EHR audit logs, HL7 v2 interface engine logs, DICOM DIMSE logs, environmental monitoring sensors, pharmacy system logs, LIS results, CMMS biomedical equipment records.

subcategories.name: Transportation and Logistics
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom HEC inputs from telematics/fleet systems, WMS/TMS application logs, IoT sensors via MQTT, GPS tracking platforms.
subcategories.dataSources: GPS telematics data, OBD-II diagnostic codes, WMS/TMS application logs, IoT sensors via MQTT, port management systems, rail signaling logs.

subcategories.name: Oil, Gas, and Mining
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk OT Intelligence (Splunkbase 5180), OT Security Add-on (Splunkbase 5151), Edge Hub, custom HEC inputs from SCADA/historians.
subcategories.dataSources: PI/OSIsoft historian via HEC, SCADA RTU data, OPC-UA tags, Edge Hub environmental sensors, fleet telematics, pipeline monitoring systems.

subcategories.name: Retail and E-Commerce Operations
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom HEC inputs from POS systems, e-commerce platforms, retail IoT sensors, Wi-Fi controllers, digital signage systems.
subcategories.dataSources: POS transaction logs, e-commerce platform logs, retail IoT sensors (foot traffic, environmental), Wi-Fi controller logs, inventory management systems.

subcategories.name: Aviation and Airport Operations
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Airport Ground Operations App (Splunkbase 7793), Airport CIM for Splunk (GitHub splunk/airport_cim_for_splunk), custom HEC inputs from A-CDM, BHS, and airport SCADA.
subcategories.dataSources: A-CDM feeds, baggage BRS messages, airport SCADA alarms, queue camera systems, FIDS data, airfield vehicle tracking, gate management systems.

subcategories.name: Telecommunications Operations
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom HEC/syslog inputs from network elements, OSS/BSS systems, SNMP from core/RAN equipment, CDN logs.
subcategories.dataSources: SNMP from network elements, syslog from core/RAN, OSS/BSS application logs, CDN logs, performance counters, provisioning systems.

subcategories.name: Water and Wastewater Utilities
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Edge Hub, custom HEC inputs from SCADA/RTU systems, environmental sensors (MQTT), lab information management systems (LIMS).
subcategories.dataSources: SCADA/RTU data via Edge Hub or HEC, environmental sensors (MQTT), LIMS results, GIS/hydraulic model outputs, pump station PLCs.

subcategories.name: Insurance and Claims Processing
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk App for Fraud Analytics, Behavioral Profiling App, custom HEC inputs from claims management and policy administration systems.
subcategories.dataSources: Claims management system logs, policy administration system, fraud analytics platform, behavioral profiling app, underwriting systems.
